product_summary: Interactive React Server Components stream visualizer. A free open-source browser app written in TypeScript that runs both the server and client sides of the React Server Components protocol in your browser and shows the streaming output step by step.
feature_list: Runs both Server and Client parts of RSC in the browser
Uses React Server DOM WebSocket and worker
Simulates real RSC environment without backend
Shows React tree evolution as server streams chunks
Examples: async components, counters, form actions, pagination, error handling
Built for educators and frontend developers

product_summary: AI-driven code review via Git. An open-source provider-agnostic code review tool built in pure bash that runs anywhere with zero dependencies and plugs into Git as a pre-commit hook to check staged files before they land in the repo.
feature_list: Provider-agnostic AI code review (Claude, Gemini, Codex, Ollama)
Built in pure bash, zero dependencies
Catches style, structure, and architectural issues early
Instant automated review on every commit

product_summary: Friendly Terminal UI for SQLite databases. An open-source Python-powered terminal UI that connects you instantly to SQLite, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Turso and more, all from a single interface. It runs right in your terminal with VIM-style key bindings.
feature_list: Multi-database support (SQLite, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Turso)
Terminal-based UI with VIM-style key bindings
Fuzzy search through millions of rows
Secure credentials stored in OS keyring

product_summary: The data platform for Physical AI. A blazing-fast data platform designed to bridge the gap between Robotics and Physical AI. It streamlines data management and compression for robotics applications.
feature_list: Designed for robotics and embodied AI

product_summary: Google in your terminal. A fast, script-friendly CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Chat, Classroom, Drive, Docs, Slides, Sheets, Contacts, Tasks, and People. Access Google services directly from the command line.
feature_list: CLI access to Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets

product_summary: AI-powered development workflow planning tool. An open-source project that helps plan AI-powered development workflows with structured spec-driven development.
Image processing and management tool. An open-source project for handling and processing images with various utilities.
JSON utilities for AI agents. An open-source project providing JSON handling and processing capabilities specifically designed for AI agent workflows.
Go SDK for Invoice Ninja. An open-source Go software development kit for integrating with the Invoice Ninja invoicing platform.
feature_list: Go SDK for Invoice Ninja API

product_summary: Mixture of Experts implementation. An open-source project related to Noumena Network and Mixture of Experts (MoE) architectures for AI.
Console interface for AI agents. An open-source project providing a console-based interface for managing and interacting with AI agents.
AI and machine learning toolkit. An open-source project from Rallies AI providing tools and utilities for AI/ML workflows.
MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools and converters. An open-source project for working with Model Context Protocol in AI applications.
LLM exploration and testing tool. An open-source project by Sam Who for exploring and testing Large Language Models.
AI-powered image editing tool. An open-source project for intelligent image editing and manipulation using AI.
Notification and messaging system. An open-source project by Rob Zolkos for notifications and messaging workflows.
Visual tracking and monitoring tool. An open-source project for visual tracking and monitoring applications.
Social media mention tracking bot. An open-source automation bot for tracking mentions across social networks.
PDF processing and AI extraction tool. An open-source project by Joel Hooks for intelligent PDF processing and information extraction.
Obsidian plugin for life tracking. An open-source Obsidian plugin for tracking various aspects of your life, habits, and personal data.

Physics-based robot motion retargeting framework from Facebook Research. Designed to retarget human motion data into dynamically feasible robot actions across many robot types by using physics-informed sampling and simulation.
feature_list: Human motion to robot action conversion

product_summary: GPU upscaling and frame generation for macOS. An open-source native macOS application built with SwiftUI and Apple's Metal GPU framework that delivers upscaling and frame generation similar to DLSS/FSR tailored for Apple Silicon.

Universal AI Agent tool layer. An open-source universal tool use layer that provides a lightweight server as a bridge between large language model agents and external tools, exposing a uniform HTTP surface.
Plugin bundle for OpenCode agent. An open-source plugin suite that layers curated subagents, asynchronous workflows, model integrations, and LSP/AST support atop the base OpenCode agent experience.

AI Reflection on Hacker News History by Andrej Karpathy. Collects Hacker News threads from years past and analyzes them with large language models, letting you ask questions and get reflective summaries about how ideas and opinions have aged.

AI assistant with MCP tools for Excel. A Python project that builds an Excel MCP server and an AI agent runner so large language models can read, edit, and automate Excel files via structured tools and prompts.

POC for tracking device online status. Demonstrates how phone number delivery receipts and round-trip timing leaks can reveal whether a device is active, idle, or offline on platforms like WhatsApp or Signal.
AI web monitoring and alert platform. An open-source platform that lets you define Scouts (automated monitors) to search the web for keywords or conditions and send email alerts when matches occur.
Rust embedded SQL database engine. An open-source embedded SQL database written in Rust focusing on simplicity, performance, and modern SQL engine patterns without external dependencies.
Multi-LLM orchestration framework. An open-source project providing an orchestration layer over multiple large language models, letting you define pipelines, branching logic, and model strategies.
Lightweight Agent Framework Foundation. A free open-source Python framework for building agents with flexible tool execution, context management, and modular skills.
Simple semantic memory for Claude Code. An open-source memory module designed specifically for Claude Code that stores and retrieves context with a focus on relevance and simplicity.
Enhanced ComfyUI web interface. An open-source web interface built atop local ComfyUI installation with richer browser GUI, workspace management, node search, presets, and UI workflows.
Detects RSC, Next.js, RCE vulnerabilities. An open-source Python CLI tool that tests Next.js apps using React Server Components for remote code execution weaknesses tied to recently disclosed CVEs.

From papers to slides in one click. A free open-source Python-driven pipeline that reads PDFs, Word files, and markdown, builds a RAG-powered index, extracts key content and figures, and generates professional-grade visuals.
AI Storyboard to Video Generator. An open-source AI-assisted storyboard and video generation tool that turns your story idea into a full video sequence with intermediate transitions.

Quick Markdown Search - local markdown search engine. An open-source on-device search engine for markdown files combining BM25 full-text search with vector semantic search and optional LLM re-ranking.
Adaptive Multi-Provider Prompt Optimizer. An open-source Python prompt optimization system that rewrites prompts to fit the idiosyncrasies of each LLM API you target.

General Purpose AI Image Generator. An open-source AI image generation framework built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS connecting with multiple generative backends like Hugging Face, SD, and ModelScope.

Bilingual Image Generation Foundation Model. A foundation model by Meitu and Longcat team focusing on bilingual Chinese-English text-to-image generation with strong photo-realism at 6 billion parameters.
macOS iMessage and SMS CLI. A free open-source Go-based command line app that lets you send, receive, list, and live-stream Apple messages (iMessage and SMS) from your Mac.
feature_list: CLI for iMessage and SMS on macOS

product_summary: Visual Prompt Library for AI Art. An open-source visual prompt management system with an intuitive web interface to organize, browse, edit, and search artistic prompts with visual previews.
AI Design Intelligence for UI-UX. An open-source AI skill providing a searchable database of UI styles, color palettes, font pairings, chart types, UX guidelines, and stack-specific best practices.
feature_list: Multi-framework support (HTML, Tailwind, React, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI)

product_summary: Terminal Spreadsheet with Rich Features. A robust open-source CLI spreadsheet app written in Go using TUI library with 100+ built-in functions, rich formatting, multi-sheet workbooks, and support for XLSX, CSV, HTML, PDF.
Raw Photo Color Grading Bridge. An open-source Python-based CLI utility that bridges raw photo files and cinematic lookup table color grading by converting raw data into wide gamut linear space.

macOS LLM Session Monitor. An open-source desktop app written in Rust with Tauri/React frontend that shows all active Claude Code Agent Sessions with real-time status, quick session focus, and global hotkey access.

Personal Research Knowledge Base. A free open-source personal research platform that ingests articles, extracts key insights, tracks references, and surfaces unexpected connections between ideas across domains.
Markdown Plus Diagrams, Math Editor. An open-source professional Markdown editor running in the browser with GitHub-flavored Markdown, Mermaid diagram support, and KaTeX math rendering.
Local AI Song STEM Separator. An open-source AI-powered audio STEM separation app running locally with no subscriptions, using state-of-the-art models like Demucs and MDX-Net.
AI PDF Edit with Natural Language. An open-source CLI tool that lets you edit PDF slides and documents using natural language prompts powered by Google's Gemini 2.0 Pro model.

High-speed text to image server. A free open-source web app with React + FastAPI stack that runs Alibaba 6B parameter Z-Image model locally to generate images from text prompts with snappy performance.

Browser AI translation extension. An open-source browser extension that lets you select text and translate it on the spot using multiple AI providers like OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and OpenRouter.
Decentralized AI compute by Telegram. An open-source initiative built on TON blockchain creating a decentralized AI inference marketplace with hardware trusted execution environments.

Remote Multiplatform AI Coding Control. A free open-source system that lets developers control AI coding assistance like Claude Code or Codex from platforms like Telegram or GitHub with persistent sessions.
Interactive Architecture Diagrams. An open-source web app that helps developers and architects draw, modify, and share system diagrams using an interactive canvas.

Reference payment system design. An open-source Java reference implementation showing how instant payment systems like RTP, SEPA Instant, FedNow, and UPI can be built with ISO 20022 native data models.
Docker-first RAG server. An open-source Docker-powered RAG stack combining Docling document extraction, ChromaDB vector storage, and Llama Index retrieval pipelines with a lightweight UI and API.
LLM prompt runner from your shell. An open-source command line utility that lets you execute .prompt files directly from your shell and receive structured responses back.

Customizable Browser Start Page. An open-source customizable start page for browsers offering stunning themes, clock with light/dark modes, smart search shortcuts, weather integration, and personalized quick links.
WebUI download manager for Anna's Archive. An open-source containerized download queue manager with a WebUI to queue books, manage downloads, and monitor progress with automatic fallback to mirrors.
AI Enhanced Diagram Creation. An open-source web tool that blends the familiar Draw.io diagram editor with modern AI to let you talk to your diagrams instead of dragging shapes around.
Vision Language Action AI for robots. An open research model from Declare Lab that blends vision, language, and action into one coherent system for robot control.

Types-powered CV generator. An open-source CV and resume generator focused on content first and formatting second. Define your CV in YAML and compile it into a clean PDF with perfect typography using Typst.
Autonomous AI coding companion. An open-source tool aiming to make AI coding workflows more autonomous and multi-session friendly with agentic AI principles.
Autonomous AI Developer Workspace. A local open-source agentic IDE that plans, writes, tests, and fixes code autonomously with a visual Kanban board and AI agents.
AI Image to editable layers. An open-source model that takes a flat image and tears it apart into semantically meaningful RGBA layers for independent editing.
Context-driven Gemini CLI extension. An open-source extension for the Gemini CLI that introduces context-driven development with persistent markdown specs and plans.
Minimal Zero Dependency PDF Library. A tiny, zero-dependency PDF creation library written in TypeScript with fewer than 400 lines of code for generating real PDF documents.
Lightweight Megatron Implementation. An open-source project providing a light implementation of Megatron-style architectures for study and experimentation with large transformer models.

Historical Language Model InfoHub. An open information hub tracking research on training language models exclusively on historically bounded text datasets to create models representing past society's norms and knowledge.
Vision to Action Gaming AI. An open research model for generalist gaming agents that takes raw game frames as input and predicts controller actions through behavior cloning.
AI quota monitor for macOS. A macOS menu bar app that tracks usage quotas for multiple AI assistants like Claude, Codex, Gemini, and Copilot in real time.
Festive CLI extension. A GitHub CLI extension that turns your terminal into an animated festive Yule Log display while you browse commit history.
Tailwind-style SQL queries. An experimental project that lets you encode SQL into class-like syntax inside React Server Components for playful query exploration.
Spectraven LLM Workflow System. An open-source system for metaprompting, context engineering, and Spectraven development targeted at Claude Code.
Cinematic Code History View. An open-source web app that transforms your GitHub or GitLab activity into a cinematic story-style timeline with smooth visual slides.
Driving Visual Geometry Transformer. A research-oriented visual geometry transformer model that reconstructs dense 3D scene geometry from multi-view images for autonomous driving.
Feed-forward 3D object articulation. An open-source research project that takes a single static 3D mesh and instantly identifies its articulated structure using a feed-forward transformer model.
Guided AI-driven product design tool. An open-source product planning and design workspace that guides builders through structured conversations to define vision, roadmap, data models, and UI.
AI-driven cyber-range management. An open-source Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that lets AI assistants manage Ludus cyber-range environments with natural language.

Promptable world simulation AI. An open-source multimodal framework that lets users generate rich coherent video events by combining natural language, reference images, and object trajectories into a unified simulation engine.
Zero dependency HTML5 parser in JavaScript. A pure JavaScript port of the minimalist HTML5 parser aiming to pass the full HTML5 test suite with no dependencies.
End-to-end video-to-motion pipeline. An open-source project that strings together video generation, human pose extraction, and robot motion conversion into a seamless system.
Multi-agent AI trading system. An open-source agent-based AI trading system built around large language models that analyze market conditions, adapt strategies, and execute trades in real time.
Terminal First Markdown Research Tool. An open-source lightweight markdown research tool built in Rust that channels the feel of Obsidian into your shell for distraction-free note-taking.
Keyboard First PostgreSQL Manager. An open-source keyboard-first PostgreSQL manager with a full-screen TUI built in Rust to help developers work faster without leaving the terminal.

Fast monocular view synthesis from photos. An open-source research project from Apple that synthesizes photo-realistic new viewpoints from just one image by predicting a compact 3D Gaussian scene representation.
Live Coding Music with Prolog Logic. An open-source live coding environment where you write Prolog-style rules to define rhythmic and melodic patterns that play in real time.
Freeing Elite tab completion. An open-source project that reverse engineers the sophisticated AI-powered tab completion from the Cursor editor so other IDEs can use it too.
Deep Linking Made Simple. An open-source zero-dependency JavaScript toolkit that detects common web URLs and opens content in native mobile apps when available.
Self-Hosted All-in-One Media Manager. A self-hosted media management app built in TypeScript with SvelteKit frontend and Node.js backend for organizing movies and TV shows.
Real Estate Listing Tracker and Organizer. A friendly workspace for saving, tagging, and tracking homes you're considering. Built with Python and JavaScript on top of Odoo.
Private Journal, Self-hosted privacy-first journaling. A privacy-first self-hosted journaling app that gives you a safe home for your thoughts and mood tracking.
Local-first personal AI assistant. A personal AI assistant that lives on your own machines and talks to you on WhatsApp, Telegram, WebChat, and Native Apps.
GUI-based Proxy Validation Tool. A desktop app written in Python with a dark-themed GUI that tests HTTP, HTTPS, SOCKS4, and SOCKS5 proxies in real-time.
Self-hosted STL to Step Converter. A self-hosted web app that converts STL mesh files into solid STEP format on your own hardware using FreeCAD running headless inside Docker.
Markdown site publishing framework. An open-source publishing framework built so Markdown content instantly syncs from your terminal to browsers, LLMs and agents.
Universal Reddit Scraper Suite. A full-featured Reddit Scraper Suite that works on any subreddit or user, giving you raw data and analytics without relying on official APIs.
Web-based enhanced CSV Editor. A web-based spreadsheet editor supporting the CSVX format - an enhanced CSV format with rich formatting capabilities.
Kanban board for AI coding agents. An open-source Kanban board designed to orchestrate AI coding agents and human tasks together. Built with React and Tailwind UI.
